meta.title: Tan Chau Thanh Co., Ltd — Events & Communications
meta.description: Tan Chau Thanh — professional event and communications partner in Hanoi since 2018. Directing, production, event staffing and equipment.

hero.title: Crafting events of national scale
hero.subtitle: From concept and script to full production — Tan Chau Thanh has delivered large-scale political and cultural events since 2018.

about.title: Your events & communications partner since 2018
about.body: Tan Chau Thanh delivers end-to-end event solutions: directing, scripting, production, staffing and equipment. Our experienced team has contributed to national-scale programs including the SEA Games 22 closing ceremony and the 1000th Anniversary of Thang Long – Hanoi.

direction.title: Directing & Scripting
direction.desc: Concept development, scripting and directing for programs and events.

talent.title: Event talent
talent.desc: Bands, singers, MCs, dance and performance groups, hostesses.

equipment.title: Event equipment
equipment.desc: Modern sound, lighting, staging and instruments at grand scale.

contact.title: Start your event
contact.subtitle: Contact Tan Chau Thanh for consultation and to bring your program to life.

footer.rights: © {year} Tan Chau Thanh Co., Ltd. All rights reserved.
